page.title: Ferretti 94 Charter Review: What It's Like Onboard in Marbella

data.meta_description: Read our honest Ferretti 94 charter review in Marbella. 29m, 12 guests, from Puerto Banús. See what it's really like onboard and book your day.
data.summary: An honest first-hand review of chartering the Ferretti 94 in Marbella, covering the onboard experience, amenities, and the best coastal spots to visit.
key_facts: Length: 29 m (95 ft) – our largest fleet vessel.
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.
Pricing on request via WhatsApp – not listed online.
Spacious flybridge, salon, and multiple sunbathing areas.

faq.q: How much does it cost to charter the Ferretti 94 in Marbella?
faq.a: Pricing for the Ferretti 94 is on request via WhatsApp. It is our most premium vessel, so rates vary by season and duration. Contact us directly for a custom quote that includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.

faq.q: How many guests can the Ferretti 94 accommodate?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 sleeps up to 12 guests onboard. For day charters, the maximum is also 12 passengers, ensuring plenty of space to spread out across the salon, flybridge, and bow sun pads.

faq.q: What is included in a Ferretti 94 charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You only need to bring your own towel and sunscreen.

faq.q: Where does the Ferretti 94 depart from?
faq.a: All our boats, including the Ferretti 94, depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. This puts you minutes from the Golden Mile and within easy reach of Cabopino, Estepona, and Sotogrande.

faq.q: Can we swim and use water toys from the Ferretti 94?
faq.a: Yes. The crew will anchor at a calm cove such as Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. The boat has a swim platform and ladder. Jet skis or inflatables can be arranged on request at an additional cost.

faq.q: Is the Ferretti 94 suitable for a wedding or party?
faq.a: Absolutely. With its vast deck space, flybridge bar, and elegant interior, the Ferretti 94 is popular for celebrations, proposals, and corporate events. However, the maximum guest count is 12, so plan accordingly.

faq.q: What is the onboard experience like compared to smaller yachts?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 offers a true superyacht feel. The salon is full-beam with panoramic windows, the flybridge has a wet bar and sun pads, and the bow features a large sunbathing area. It feels spacious and luxurious, even with a full guest list.

faq.q: How do I book the Ferretti 94?
faq.a: Visit our Ferretti 94 page and click the WhatsApp button. Provide your preferred date, duration, and any special requests. We will confirm availability and send a quote within a few hours.

data.body_html:
If you are looking for the ultimate day on the water in Marbella, the Ferretti 94 is the flagship of our fleet. At 29 metres (95 feet), it is the largest yacht we offer, and it delivers a genuine superyacht experience without the superyacht price tag. This is our honest review of what it is really like to charter the Ferretti 94 from Puerto Banús.

First Impressions: Stepping Aboard at Puerto Banús

You meet the Ferretti 94 at the dock in Puerto Banús. At 29 metres, she towers over most of the other charter boats in the marina. The crew greets you at the gangway, and you step onto the aft deck. The first thing you notice is the space: the teak-laid cockpit has a large dining table and a built-in sofa that seats eight easily. The salon doors slide open, making the indoor and outdoor areas feel like one continuous room. The interior is light, with cream leather sofas and a galley to port. The helm station is forward, but you will probably spend most of your time on the flybridge or the bow.

The Flybridge: Where You Will Spend Your Day

Up the teak stairs, the flybridge is the real living area. There is a wet bar with a sink, fridge, and ice maker, a large U-shaped sofa, and a sun pad aft. The skipper steers from a second helm station here, so you can chat while he navigates. The bimini provides shade, but the sun pads get full sun – perfect for tanning. On a calm day, you can cruise at 20-22 knots, and the ride is smooth. The Ferretti 94 has a deep-V hull, so even in a slight chop, you stay dry and comfortable.

Interior: Salon, Cabins, and Amenities

Below deck, the Ferretti 94 has four cabins: a master suite amidships with a king bed and en suite, a VIP forward, and two twin cabins. All have air conditioning, TVs, and en suite heads. The finish is high-gloss walnut and marble. For a day charter, you probably will not use the cabins, but they are there if you need to change or rest. The galley is fully equipped, though the crew handles all food and drink. The boat carries a full inventory of glassware, crockery, and linens.

Where You Can Go: Best Routes from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, you have several options. The most popular route is east to Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés, two sheltered coves with clear water. It is about 15 minutes at cruising speed. Another option is west to Estepona, a 20-minute run, where you can anchor off the old town. If you want a longer trip, head to Sotogrande (45 minutes) or even Gibraltar (1 hour 15 minutes). The crew will recommend a route based on the wind and your preferences. All charters include a stop for swimming, and you can bring your own snorkel gear or use the boat's masks.

What's Included and What's Extra

Every charter on the Ferretti 94 includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). That means you pay nothing extra on the day. If you want a jet ski, you can add one for an additional fee – we recommend booking in advance. The crew will prepare a lunch if you request it (chargeable), or you can bring your own food. We also offer a champagne upgrade for celebrations.

Who Is the Ferretti 94 For?

This yacht is ideal for groups who want a premium experience without the formality of a crewed superyacht. It works well for corporate days, milestone birthdays, proposals, and family outings. The maximum of 12 guests means you have plenty of space – you will never feel crowded. Because we operate a boat rental Marbella service that is owner-managed, the service is personal and flexible. The Ferretti 94 is not the cheapest option in our fleet – the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 start at €749 for two hours – but for a true luxury day, it is unmatched.

How to Book

Pricing for the Ferretti 94 is on request via WhatsApp. Visit the Ferretti 94 charter page and send us a message with your preferred date and duration. We will confirm availability and send a quote within hours. For a full overview of all our yachts, see our fleet page.

Frequently asked questions

How much does it cost to charter the Ferretti 94 in Marbella?

Pricing for the Ferretti 94 is on request via WhatsApp. It is our most premium vessel, so rates vary by season and duration. Contact us directly for a custom quote that includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.

How many guests can the Ferretti 94 accommodate?

The Ferretti 94 sleeps up to 12 guests onboard. For day charters, the maximum is also 12 passengers, ensuring plenty of space to spread out across the salon, flybridge, and bow sun pads.

What is included in a Ferretti 94 charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You only need to bring your own towel and sunscreen.

Where does the Ferretti 94 depart from?

All our boats, including the Ferretti 94, depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. This puts you minutes from the Golden Mile and within easy reach of Cabopino, Estepona, and Sotogrande.

Can we swim and use water toys from the Ferretti 94?

Yes. The crew will anchor at a calm cove such as Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. The boat has a swim platform and ladder. Jet skis or inflatables can be arranged on request at an additional cost.

Is the Ferretti 94 suitable for a wedding or party?

Absolutely. With its vast deck space, flybridge bar, and elegant interior, the Ferretti 94 is popular for celebrations, proposals, and corporate events. However, the maximum guest count is 12, so plan accordingly.

What is the onboard experience like compared to smaller yachts?

The Ferretti 94 offers a true superyacht feel. The salon is full-beam with panoramic windows, the flybridge has a wet bar and sun pads, and the bow features a large sunbathing area. It feels spacious and luxurious, even with a full guest list.

How do I book the Ferretti 94?

Visit our Ferretti 94 page and click the WhatsApp button. Provide your preferred date, duration, and any special requests. We will confirm availability and send a quote within a few hours.
